author: James Karlsson & Thomas Goldman
description: Run normal fenced Markdown code blocks in Obsidian while keeping native syntax highlighting. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

- 0e6720e: Add trusted custom MIME renderer hooks for rich display outputs (23384) [#69](https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/69)
- db903dd: Route Graphviz rendering through execution groups (23384) [#69](https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/69)

releases.name: Nightly Build

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Changes based on the linter, tests are failing and have to test full functionality by @Thomy-G in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/53
* Address ESLint review warnings without breaking smoke test execution by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/54
* Resolve remaining Obsidian review findings by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/55
* Banana fix final CSS review warnings by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/56
* Add staged custom source preprocessors by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/57


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Normalise LLVM render execution and snippet disposal semantics by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/1
* Formalise container execution across OCI QEMU and user supplied runtimes by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/2
* All my homies hate JS by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/5
* Add AST mediated symbol graph traversal for runnable source fragment … by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/8
* Introduce compiled plugin provenance checks and profile scoped vault smoke lanes by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/11
* Changes by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/13
* Extend runnable block execution with stdin backed input surfaces by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/14
* Fix stale rendered output panels after container default settings mut… by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/24
* Added Windows+WSL workflow and staged container group testing by @Thomy-G in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/22
* lang packs by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/25
* Chud life by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/26
* Trusted Obsidian runtime execution for JS snippets w vault mutation h… by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/27
* Added nightly build and release workflows  by @Thomy-G in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/28
* hashes   by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/36
* Fix PDF exports for Loom decorated code blocks by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/37
* other changes + additions by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/39
* Restructure documentation: split README.md into docs/ directory and c… by @Thomy-G in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/38
* Rebrand plugin surface to Lotus by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/40
* Add observability signing and workflow hardening by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/47
* Add MIT License to the project by @Thomy-G in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/42
* Add observability signing and workflow hardening by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/48
* Reduce SSH auth churn and align release metadata by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/49
* Fix Windows systems smoke execution by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/50
* Document contributor process by @23384 in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/51

## New Contributors
* @Thomy-G made their first contribution in https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/pull/22

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TzadikimBIU/lotus/commits/v1.0.0
